name: Baked tofu bánh-mì-style sandwich
steps: Slice and bake the tofu at 200°C (400°F) until firm, about 25 minutes.
Quick-pickle the carrot and daikon in rice vinegar (no sugar).
Fill the roll with tofu, pickles, cucumber, cilantro and chili-garlic sauce.

ingredients.name: Pickled carrot & daikon, cucumber, cilantro, chili-garlic sauce
